source_document: IMDRF Adverse Event Terminology — Annex A (Medical Device Problem), Annex E (Health Effects), Annex F (Health Impact)

rules.obligation: Each complaint must be coded with an Annex A device-problem term and an Annex F harm term.
rules.agent_instruction: Use the harm_by_imdrf cross-tabulation verbatim. Each complaint appears under exactly one Annex A and one Annex F term. Do not double-count.

rules.obligation: Level 2 IMDRF terms are sufficient for grouping in PSUR tables.
rules.agent_instruction: Group serious incidents at IMDRF Annex A Level 2 unless deeper detail is needed.
